title: The North-Eastern Hill University Act, 1973
full_text: The North-Eastern Hill University Act, 1973 पूर्वोत्तर पहाड़ी विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1973 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197324 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 1973-05-26 Act Year: 1973 Short Title: The North-Eastern Hill University Act, 1973 Hindi Title: पूर्वोत्तर पहाड़ी विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1973 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University for the hill areas of the North-Eastern region. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 19-07-1973 Notification: 19th July, 1973, vide notification No. S.O. 223(E), dated 19th July, 1973, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The North-Eastern Hill University Act, 1973 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The University. Section 4. Objects. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. Visitor. Section 9. Chief Rector. Section 10. Officers of the University. Section 11. The Chancellor. Section 12. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 13. The Pro-Vice-Chancellors. Section 14. Deans of Schools. Section 15. The Registrar. Section 16. The Finance Officer. Section 17. Other officers. Section 18. Authorities of the University. Section 19. The Court. Section 20. The Executive Council. Section 21. The Academic Council. Section 22. Other authorities of the University. Section 23. Planning Board. Section 24. Power to make Statutes. Section 25. Statutes how made. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Ordinances. Section 27. Regulations. Section 28. Annual report. Section 29. Annual accounts. Section 30. Conditions of service of employees. Section 31. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 32. Right to appeal. Section 33. Provident and pension funds. Section 34. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 35. Constitution of Committees. Section 36. Filling of casual Vacancies. Section 37. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 38. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 39. Mode of proof of University record. Section 40. Power to remove difficulties. Section 41. Transitional provisions. Section 42. Completion of courses of students in colleges or Institutions affiliated to the University. Schedule 1.
